metadata.title: RA•IO | Training is a feeling
metadata.description: A premium brand for natural movement, handmade tools, and embodied presence.

hero.imageAlt: RA•IO training outdoors with a natural tool
hero.title: Training is a feeling.
hero.copy: Natural strength. Handmade tools. Movement in presence.

philosophy.heading: Movement is a ritual.
philosophy.body: RA•IO is built for those who seek more than simple training. It is a connection with nature, your body, and community. Here, lasting strength is born.
philosophy.imageAlt: RA•IO stone training tool with a moss-covered handle

metadata.title: Training | RA•IO
metadata.description: RA•IO training brings together strength, endurance, and mindful movement with the rhythm of nature.

training.label: Training
heroText: RA•IO training brings together strength, endurance, and mindful movement with the rhythm of nature.
All of nature is your training ground.
training.listIntro: We offer a range of trainings that support both body and mind. Choose the format that suits you and connect through movement - with yourself, nature, and community.

trainings.title: Functional training
trainings.description: All-round development of the body through natural movement patterns and varied tasks.

trainings.title: Strength & endurance training
trainings.description: A focus on strength, endurance, and building physical capacity with natural tools.

trainings.title: Mobility & flexibility
trainings.description: Training for mobility, flexibility, and body awareness that helps prevent injuries and improves movement quality.

trainings.title: Ritual movement & breathing
trainings.description: A slowing, grounding blend of practices that supports the nervous system, clarity, and inner balance.

lasting.title: Training that stays with you afterwards.
lasting.text: Our trainings take place in small groups, in carefully chosen places, where we can focus on what is essential - quality and a real experience.
lasting.imageAlt: A training group by a lake in nature

workshop.title: Want to host a training or workshop?
workshop.text: We offer options for private and corporate groups. Write to us and we'll create the right experience together.

metadata.title: Tools | RA•IO
metadata.description: RA•IO handcrafted training tools made of wood and stone.

tools.label: Tools
tools.heroTitle: Made from nature. For training that lasts.
heroText: RA•IO tools are handcrafted training tools that combine the strength of nature, simplicity, and timeless durability.

categories.title: Wooden tools
categories.description: Staffs, clubs, and other wooden training tools.

categories.title: Kettlebells
categories.description: Stone kettlebells and wood & stone kettlebells.

categories.title: Dumbbells
categories.description: Stone dumbbells with wooden handles for strength and endurance training.

categories.title: For children
categories.description: Safe, natural training tools made for children.

categories.title: Other tools
categories.description: Additional tools to add variety to your movement.

material.title: Why wood and stone?
material.text: Wood and stone are natural, durable, and timeless materials that create a genuine connection to the ground in training. Each tool is unique - in its shape, weight, and texture.
material.imageAlt: Natural stone as a training tool material

values.title: Balance with nature
values.text: Natural materials support the body's natural development and functional movement.

values.title: Timeless quality
values.text: Each tool is made to last for years and to become even more characterful over time.

values.title: A genuine experience
values.text: Training that doesn't depend on trends, but rests on lasting value and feel.

care.title: Care
lines: Clean with a damp cloth after training.
Avoid keeping it in water for long periods.
If the wood dries out, treat it with natural oil as needed.
Cared for properly, they last for generations.
care.imageAlt: Cleaning a kettlebell with a cloth

custom.title: Want a custom solution?
lines: We also make tools to order, with the weight, size, or material that suits your wishes.
Get in touch and we'll create something unique.
custom.imageAlt: A stone training tool by a lake

metadata.title: Events | RA•IO
metadata.description: RA•IO events bring together movement, nature, and community.

events.label: Events
heroText: RA•IO events bring together movement, nature, and community.
Trainings, workshops, and challenges that create space to grow.

events.title: Morning movement by the river
events.description: Functional training in nature. Breathing, strength, and presence.

events.title: Kettlebell workshop
events.description: Learn kettlebell technique, use, and history.

events.title: Sunrise training and swim
events.description: Movement, cold water, and a morning ritual.

events.title: Strength evening & sauna ritual
events.description: An evening strength session, fire, sauna, and a circle of conversation.

host.title: Host your own event.
host.text: Company days, workshops, and movement experiences in nature.
host.imageAlt: A forest event area with kettlebells and wooden training tools

journal.label: RA•IO+
heroText: Here you'll find stories about training, nature, the craft of making, and everyday movement.

articles.title: The power of morning movement
articles.excerpt: Why early-morning training brings clarity, energy, and calm to the day.

articles.title: Made by hand
articles.excerpt: Every tool is made by hand. From choosing the materials to the finish - the story behind the process.

articles.title: Functional strength in nature
articles.excerpt: How to build strength, endurance, and mobility using the body and nature.

articles.title: Silence as a source of strength
articles.excerpt: Why time spent in silence helps strengthen focus, the nervous system, and inner resilience.

articles.title: Wood and stone - a timeless pairing
articles.excerpt: Natural materials that endure over time and support our movement.

articles.title: Recovery in nature
articles.excerpt: How nature helps reduce stress and improves our physical and mental well-being.

signup.title: Join RA•IO+
signup.text: From time to time we send good thoughts, news, and stories that support your journey.

metadata.title: About | RA•IO
metadata.description: The RA•IO story — movement, handmade tools, and experiences in nature.

about.label: About
heroText: RA•IO exists so these three are not separate things, but one whole journey back to the body and to nature.
story: The brand's public name is RA•IO and the legal company is Raio33Movement OÜ.
There is room here for movement, events, and handcrafted tools alike - all born from the same wish to move slower, by hand, and for real.
about.storyImageAlt: RA•IO stone training tool with a moss-covered handle

values.title: Movement
values.text: Natural, mindful movement in the rhythm of nature.

values.title: Craft
values.text: Handmade tools of stone and wood, built to last.

values.title: Experience
values.text: Events and presence that connect people and nature.

about.closingText: Questions, collaboration, or orders — write to us.

contact.title: Write when you want to train, order, or build something together.
contact.description: We handle training, events, orders, and collaboration enquiries from one place.
contact.response: Send a short note about what you want to move forward with. We will reply as soon as possible.

topics.title: Orders
topics.text: Training tools, pre-orders, and production timing.

topics.title: Training and events
topics.text: Groups, workshops, challenges, and custom formats.
